'''Eru Matalis''', best known by his title of '''[[Havac]]''', was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] born on [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]]. He was a freelance journalist, media correspondent, and [[holodocumentarian]]; among other employers, he worked for the [[Eriadu Free HoloDaily]].

==Biography==
During the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]], Matalis was active as an avid proponent of nonhuman and civilian rights during the conflict; afterward, he created several [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] documentaries on the unjust and immoral practices of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. The fact that his documentaries were largely unnoticed somewhat dampened his idealism, and he joined the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]], rising to become head of its Eriadu cell and founding the Front's militant wing. He become one of the Havacs of the Front, and then became the only Havac, having assumed sole leadership over the entire Front.

It was his idea (along with the secret assistance of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]) to hire [[Arwen Cohl]], attack the Federation at [[Dorvalla/Legends|Dorvalla]], attempt two assassinations of [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]], and murder the [[Trade Federation Directorate]]. He was killed at the [[Eriadu Trade Summit]] by Arwen Cohl who also died.
